mapper.select: select pm.id, pm.user_id, u.real_name, u.username, u.email, pm.project_role, pm.member_status, pm.joined_at from project_member pm inner join sys_user u on u.id = pm.user_id where pm.project_id = #{projectId} and u.is_deleted = 0 order by pm.created_at desc

select pm.id, pm.user_id, u.real_name, u.username, u.email, pm.project_role, pm.member_status, pm.joined_at from project_member pm inner join sys_user u on u.id = pm.user_id where pm.id = #{id} and u.is_deleted = 0
select id, project_id, user_id, project_role, member_status, joined_at, left_at, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at from project_member where id = #{id}
select count(1) from project_member where project_id = #{projectId} and project_role = 'PROJECT_MANAGER' and member_status = 'ACTIVE'
